//: Standalone runtimeconfig consumed by netcorehost's initialize_for_runtime_config. dotnet build also emits one of these next to the DLL; this committed copy documents the expected shape and lets the Rust host boot even if it is pointed at a directory that only contains the DLL + this file. Targets the .NET 8 desktop-less shared runtime (Microsoft.NETCore.App).

configProperties.//rollForward: Allow a newer installed 8.x patch/minor runtime to satisfy this.
